description: Make nouns explicitly advertised by selected room descriptions targetable through bounded PSEUDO scenery

replacements.new:
(FLAGS RLANDBIT)
      (ACTION TROLL-ROOM-F)
      (PSEUDO "BLOOD" ROOM-DENSITY-BLOOD-F
              "BLOODSTAINS" ROOM-DENSITY-BLOOD-F
              "STAINS" ROOM-DENSITY-BLOOD-F

              "PASSAGES" ROOM-DENSITY-TROLL-PASSAGES-F
              "PASSAGE" ROOM-DENSITY-TROLL-PASSAGES-F)>
